channel.title: Design Days on Rasagy Sharma | Design Leader, Data Artist, Design Educator & Sketchnoter
channel.description: Recent content in Design Days on Rasagy Sharma | Design Leader, Data Artist, Design Educator & Sketchnoter

item.title: Panel on Vibe Architects: How Leaders Build & Sustain Creative Energy
item.description: I was invited to join a panel discussion at Design Days 2025 in Bangalore, organized by Salesforce. The panel was on how design leaders define, build & nurture culture, and inevitably discussed how AI is changing the way we work. Photo of Panel on Culture at Design Days 2025 Design Days is an annual design event held by Salesforce, with an interesting hybrid & cross-city schedule. This year, it was held in BIC, Bengaluru, along with parallel editions in Hyderabad & Singapore.
